---

Whilst many in Ecommerce are chasing high ROAS on the first
purchase, those creating sustainable businesses and brands are
merging the first purchase ROAS with LTV to truly maximise
profitability over the long-term.
Because if your CPA is lets say $25 on a $50 product, if the
customer buys another $50 product after 4 weeks via email, that
same $25 is now responsible for $100 in revenue, bumping up your
profitability per transaction.
Post Purchase LTV Ads
A campaign I ran as an example, marketing to existing
customers, the targeting I setup, ads that were run and
the insane 2500% ROAS!
Use this as an idea to test and post back in the group on
what works for you or if you have questions.
VIDEO 1
Setting Up a Post Purchase Campaign
A more detailed look at how the campaign was setup and
ideas for you to setup your own post purchase campaign.
